abstract: Self-sufficient pass/fail review gate enforcing React feature-based architecture. Two blind, identical reviewer subagents independently judge a diff or codebase against 33 decidable rules vendored as a snapshot of feature-arch v1.1.0 (10 judgment-call rules are excluded with reasons), merging verdicts fail-closed with cited evidence and an actionable fix list. Needs nothing outside its own directory at review time.
references: skills/.curated/feature-arch/ (vendoring source, v1.1.0 snapshot 2026-07-11 — not required at review time)
